identity.title: Window Comparator Detector
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: vlow
parameters.override_behavior: sets the exclusive lower window threshold relative to VSS

parameters.name: vhigh
parameters.override_behavior: sets the exclusive upper window threshold relative to VSS

properties.observable_contract: At initialization, out reflects whether vin relative to VSS lies strictly between vlow and vhigh.
Out is at the VDD rail only while vlow < V(vin,VSS) < vhigh.
Out is at the VSS rail when V(vin,VSS) is equal to or outside either window boundary.
Crossings of both vlow and vhigh in either direction update the retained in-window decision.
Out is rail-referenced to VDD and VSS with finite transition smoothing set by tedge.

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic threshold-crossing state updates and voltage contributions only.
Drive the output contribution outside crossing event blocks.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.
